opis: Rerolls Isaac's currently held collectibles into items from the Treasure Room item pool, like the D4 would. Activated collectibles can be changed into passive ones, but passive collectibles cannot turn into activated ones. Rerolls each of Isaac's passive items into a random item from the pool of the room where it was acquired. Rerolls both Isaac's active and passive items.
krotki: Rerolls Isaac's currently held collectibles into items from the Treasure Room item pool,…

opis: Rerolls all pickups in the room, like the D20 would.
krotki: Rerolls all pickups in the room, like the D20 would.

opis: Rerolls all pickups and trinkets on the entire floor. This includes shop pickups. Does not reroll pickups or trinkets in the Devil Room, Angel Room, Black Market, or Crawl Space. Pickups rerolled in shops by this effect have a chance to turn into items. If these are active items, they will have no charges when picked up.

opis: Rerolls any item pedestals on the floor, like The D6 would. Does not reroll item pedestals in the Devil Room, Angel Room, Library, Black Market, or Crawl Space. Item pedestals located in the Shop and the Library are rerolled.

opis: Rerolls and restarts the current floor, which is the same effect as Forget Me Now.
krotki: Rerolls and restarts the current floor, which is the same effect as Forget Me Now.

opis: Combines the effects of the 1-, 3-, and 4-pip rooms. (Rerolls all held items (including active), pickups, trinkets, and pedestal items like the D100.) Rerolls all held items for all characters in co-op.
